create(initializer, middlewares?).description: Create a new store with initial state and optional middleware

store.getState().description: Get the current state snapshot (includes computed properties)

store.setState(update).description: Merge partial state into current state (batched via microtask)

store.setState(updater).description: Update state using an updater function for safe reads

store.on(event, listener).description: Subscribe to all state changes or initialization

store.on(event, path, listener).description: Subscribe to changes on a specific state path

store.reset().description: Reset state to the initial value from the initializer function

store.compute(name, fn, deps).type: (name: string, fn: (state: T) => R, deps: string[]) => void
store.compute(name, fn, deps).description: Register a computed property with dependency tracking

createHook(store).description: Create a React hook bound to a store for reactive component integration

useStore(selector?, equalityFn?).description: React hook returned by createHook. Optional selector for derived slices
